category_sources: source_facts.description says it is the GNU debugger for arm-none-eabi.
display_name_sources: Project id brew:arm-none-eabi-gdb and source_facts.name provide the formula display name.
docs_sources: Official GDB documentation is hosted on Sourceware, matching the GDB project homepage in source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies GDB for an ARM embedded target.
